title: oberna alpina
intro: Oberna alpina, also known as the Alpine Toadflax, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The plant is said to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive discomfort. Oberna alpina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
